steps.title: Connect load to cost
steps.content: The first sentence says edge modeling and kitbashing process shapes in the thousands. The next sentence says these approaches are more economical than methods handling polygons in the millions.

steps.title: Signal the result
steps.content: Choice A signals replacement or contrast. Choice B gives an example, and Choice C narrows a point. The sentence needs a result transition because the lower processing load explains the economic advantage. The answer is D.
